manageMembersText: See below all users in your community. Most account settings can be set by default from the community settings page or individually. Maximum Commitment and Maximum Accumulation need to be set individually after the account is created.
allowAnonymousMemberList: Allow remote users to list users of this community
allowAnonymousMemberListHint: Allow users of remote communities to view the names, avatars and account numbers of users of this community. No contact information is provided.
minOffersHint: Minimum number of offers that a user must create during sign up.
minNeedsHint: Minimum number of wants that a user must create during sign up.
enableGroupEmailHint: Enable sending periodic newsletters with latest offers, wants and statistics to community users.
defaultGroupEmailFrequencyHint: Default frequency for sending community newsletters to new users. Users can change this setting in their account settings.
accountDefaultsText: Set the default trading actions and permissions for your community. Users can override these settings. Changing these settings will not affect existing user settings.
currencyValueHint: The value of your units in relation to the reference HOUR (one average hour of labour). It is used to calculate the conversion rate between your units and others. Use the notation n/d. Examples: if your unit is 1 hour of labour (time bank), set 1/1 — meaning 1 of your units equals 1 HOUR. If your unit is worth a fraction of an hour, set 1/10 — meaning 10 of your units equal 1 HOUR.
invalidCurrencyValue: Invalid unit value. Please use the notation n/d.
initialCreditHint: The maximum commitment that an account can have after signing up. Changing this value will not affect existing accounts.
creditLimitHint: The maximum commitment that this account can have.
maximumBalanceHint: The maximum accumulation that this account can have. Leave to 0 for unlimited.
initialMaximumBalanceHint: The maximum accumulation that an account can have after signing up. Changing this value will not affect existing accounts. Leave to 0 for unlimited.
hideBalanceHint: Hide user standing and credit/debit limits.
allowPaymentsHint: Allow users to record trades where they received the goods or service (buyer). This decreases their community standing.
allowPaymentRequestsHint: Allow users to record trades where they provided the goods or service (seller). This increases their community standing.
allowSimplePaymentsHint: Record a trade as the recipient (buyer), choosing the provider (seller) from a list.
allowSimplePaymentRequestsHint: Record a trade as the provider (seller), choosing the recipient (buyer) from a list.
allowQrPaymentsHint: Record trades as the recipient (buyer) by scanning the provider's QR code.
allowQrPaymentRequestsHint: Record trades as the provider (seller) by showing your QR code for the recipient to scan.
allowTagPaymentsHint: Record a trade as the recipient (buyer) by scanning a NFC tag.
allowTagPaymentRequestsHint: Record a trade as the provider (seller) by showing a NFC tag.
allowMultiplePaymentsHint: Record multiple trades as the recipient (buyer) in a single batch entry.
allowMultiplePaymentRequestsHint: Record multiple trades as the provider (seller) in a single batch entry.
enableAcceptPaymentsAfter2w: Accept Trades as Recipient after 2 Weeks
enableAcceptPaymentsAfter2wHint: Automatically accept all pending trades as recipient (buyer) after 2 weeks of inactivity.
enableOnPaymentCreditLimitHint: Increase the maximum commitment of the account after receiving a trade by the same quantity, up to a limit.
allowExternalPaymentsHint: Record trades as recipient (buyer) with users using other currencies.
allowExternalPaymentRequestsHint: Record trades as provider (seller) with users using other currencies.
externalPaymentsText: Define the settings for trades with accounts in other currencies. These settings apply to all accounts.
enableExternalPaymentsHint: Permit remote trades as recipient (buyer) with other CES communities.
enableExternalPaymentRequestsHint: Permit remote trades as provider (seller) with other CES communities.
enableCreditCommonsPaymentsHint: Enable the Credit Commons protocol to record trades with non-CES communities. Not recommended for production use yet.
trustlinesText: Trustlines enable external trades by defining the maximum trade surplus between your community and a specific remote community. It is the maximum amount the remote community can owe to your community.
suspendAccountConfirmText: Are you sure you want to suspend this account? The account won't be able to make or receive trades until re-enabled by an admin.
groupStatusDisabledText: The community is disabled. Users are not able to log in or make trades.
disableGroupConfirmText: Are you sure you want to disable the community {name} with code {code}? This action will disable all {members} users and remove all related accounts from the ledger. You can re-enable the community later, but all accounts will also need to be re-enabled. Only proceed if your project is finished and you want to prevent any further activity.
enableGroupConfirmText: Are you sure you want to enable the community {name} with code {code}? This action will restore the community and trustlines but does not automatically re-enable users or accounts. You will need to re-enable them manually.
